name: snulbug
description: Install snulbug and optional helpers for MCP policy gateways and remote fabric members in devcontainers.

install_source.description: Install snulbug from PyPI or directly from GitHub.

version.description: snulbug version to install when install_source is pypi.

github_ref.description: GitHub ref to install when install_source is github.

package_spec.description: Override the generated pip package spec, for example a local wheel URL or git URL.

upstream.description: Default upstream MCP URL for generated snulbug.toml.

gateway_port.description: Default snulbug gateway port for generated snulbug.toml.

registry.description: Fabric member registry path, sqlite state spec, or Redis URL.

registry_key.description: Fabric member registry key when registry uses SQLite or Redis state.

member_id.description: Fabric member id used by member-agent mode.

member_upstream.description: Fabric member upstream as NAME=URL, or codespaces:NAME:PORT[:PATH] to infer a Codespaces forwarded URL.

ttl_seconds.description: Fabric member heartbeat TTL in seconds.

heartbeat_interval.description: Fabric member heartbeat interval in seconds.

write_config.description: Allow snulbug-devcontainer-init to create snulbug.toml and policy.snulbug when missing.
